description: E-commerce platform integration for managing products, orders, and customers in a Shopify store.

tools.name: get_products
tools.description: Retrieve products from the store catalog with optional filtering by vendor or product type.

limit.description: Number of products to return (maximum 250, default 10).

vendor.description: Filter products by the vendor or brand name.

product_type.description: Filter products by the product category or type.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product.

title.description: The name or title of the product.

body_html.description: The product description in HTML format.

vendor.description: The vendor or brand name of the product.

product_type.description: The product category or type classification.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product variant.

title.description: The title or name of the variant.

price.description: The price of the variant in the store's currency.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit identifier for inventory tracking.

inventory_quantity.description: The available inventory quantity for this variant.

src.description: The URL of the product image.

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a new product in the store with optional variants and details.

title.description: The name or title of the product.

body_html.description: The product description in HTML format.

vendor.description: The vendor or brand name of the product.

product_type.description: The product category or type classification.

price.description: The price of the variant in the store's currency.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit identifier for inventory tracking.

inventory_quantity.description: The available inventory quantity for this variant.

variants.description: List of product variants with pricing and inventory details.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created product.

title.description: The name or title of the product.

body_html.description: The product description in HTML format.

vendor.description: The vendor or brand name of the product.

product_type.description: The product category or type classification.

tools.name: get_orders
tools.description: Retrieve orders from the store with optional filtering by status or creation date.

status.description: Filter orders by fulfillment status: 'open', 'closed', 'cancelled', or 'any'.

limit.description: Number of orders to return (maximum 250, default 50).

created_at_min.description: Filter orders created on or after this date (ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z').

id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

name.description: The order name or number displayed to customers.

total_price.description: The total price of the order in the store's currency.

financial_status.description: The payment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', 'refunded').

fulfillment_status.description: The shipping fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'fulfilled', 'unfulfilled').

title.description: The name or title of the ordered item.

quantity.description: The quantity of this item in the order.

price.description: The price per unit of this item in the store's currency.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a new order in the store with line items and optional customer information.

variant_id.description: The unique identifier of the product variant to order.

quantity.description: The quantity of this item in the order.

price.description: The price per unit of this item in the store's currency.

line_items.description: List of items to include in the order with variant IDs, quantities, and prices.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

first_name.description: The first name of the customer.

last_name.description: The last name of the customer.

customer.description: Customer information to associate with the order.

financial_status.description: The payment status of the order: 'pending', 'authorized', or 'paid'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created order.

name.description: The order name or number displayed to customers.

total_price.description: The total price of the order in the store's currency.

financial_status.description: The payment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', 'refunded').

tools.name: get_customers
tools.description: Retrieve customers from the store with optional filtering by email address.

limit.description: Number of customers to return (maximum 250, default 50).

email.description: Filter customers by the email address.

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

first_name.description: The first name of the customer.

last_name.description: The last name of the customer.

orders_count.description: The total number of orders placed by this customer.

total_spent.description: The total amount spent by this customer in the store's currency.
